OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

RST_REPORT_HUB_BASE_URL.description: RST Report Hub Base URL. By default, use https://api.rstcloud.net/v1. In some cases, you may want to use a local API endpoint.

RST_REPORT_HUB_API_KEY.description: Your API Key for accessing RST Cloud.

RST_REPORT_HUB_CONNECTION_TIMEOUT.description: Connection timeout to the API in seconds.

RST_REPORT_HUB_READ_TIMEOUT.description: Read timeout for each feed in seconds.

RST_REPORT_HUB_RETRY_DELAY.description: How long to wait in seconds before next attempt to connect to the API.

RST_REPORT_HUB_IMPORT_START_DATE.description: Date from which you want to retrieve the reports in the format "%Y%m%d" (for example, 20240527). By default, this start date is calculated as 7 days ago.

RST_REPORT_HUB_LANGUAGE.description: Language of the RST Report Hub content. Reach out to support@rstcloud.net if you want to update this parameter.

RST_REPORT_HUB_CREATE_OBSERVABLES.description: Whether observables are to be created in addition to indicators.

RST_REPORT_HUB_CREATE_RELATED_TO.description: Whether `related-to` relationships are to be created or not.

RST_REPORT_HUB_CREATE_CUSTOM_TTPS.description: Whether `attack-pattern` objects with custom names (not present in MITRE ATT&CK) are to be created or not.

RST_REPORT_HUB_REPORT_LABELS_DISABLED.description: Comma-separated list of labels to ignore when creating Report objects. It does not prevent reports from being created.

RST_REPORT_HUB_SET_DETECTION_FLAG.description: Whether indicators from reports should be set for detection or not.
